case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS DAVIS, ANTHONY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,222.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
